heading: Nychum vs O'Briens Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nychum, Queensland and O'Briens Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: O'Briens Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Nychum (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nychum or O'Briens Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nychum has a flood risk score of 42/100, while O'Briens Hill scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nychum scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. O'Briens Hill scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nychum or O'Briens Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. O'Briens Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
